CustomField.formula: IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, '材工'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, '選定同業')) , '1',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, '材工'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, 'その他')) , '2',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, '材工'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '工のみ') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, '選定同業')) , '3',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, '材工'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '工のみ') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, 'その他')) , '4',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, '工事失注'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '工のみ') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, '選定同業')) , '5',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, '工事失注'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '工のみ') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, 'その他')) , '6',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, '工事失注'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, '選定同業')) , '7',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, '工事失注'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, 'その他')) , '8',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, 'そもそも未参入'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '工のみ') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, '選定同業')) , '9',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, 'そもそも未参入'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '工のみ') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, 'その他')) , '10',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, 'そもそも未参入'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, '選定同業')) , '11',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, 'そもそも未参入'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '材工') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, 'その他')) , '12',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '支給') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, '工のみ'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '工のみ') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, '選定同業')) , '13',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '支給') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, '工のみ'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '工のみ') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, 'その他')) , '14',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '支給') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, 'そもそも未参入'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '工のみ') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, '選定同業')) , '15',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '支給') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, 'そもそも未参入'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '工のみ') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, 'その他')) , '16',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '支給') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, '工事失注'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '工のみ') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, '選定同業')) , '17',IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(ST_CustomerOrderForm__c, '支給') ,ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Our__c, '工事失注'),ISPICKVAL(CompetingPatterns_Competition__c, '工のみ') ,ISPICKVAL(ConflictType__c, 'その他')) , '18','その他'))))))))))))))))))
CustomField.label: モデル
